briefdescription.para: Stores screen position, device Id, local & screen positions and the hit-actor.
Radius of both the horizontal and vertical radius (useful if an ellipse).
The angle of the press point, relative to the Y-Axis.
The touch pressure.
Radius of the press point, an average of the ellipse radius.
mouse button value.
device name string.
Default Constructor.
Constructor which creates a Point instance from a TouchPoint.
Destructor.
Set the Unique Device ID.

detaileddescription.para: Each touch point has a unique device ID which specifies the touch device for that point.

briefdescription.para: Set the state of the point.
Set the screen position of the point from the top-left of the screen.

parameterdescription.para: The screen position of the point from the top-left of the screen.

briefdescription.para: Set the radius of the press point.

detaileddescription.para:
This is the average of both the horizontal and vertical radii of the press point.
radius
The average of both the horizontal and vertical radii.

briefdescription.para: Set the radius of the press point as an ellipse.

parameterdescription.para: The average of both the horizontal and vertical radii.
The horizontal and vertical radii of the press point (different if an ellipse).

briefdescription.para: Sets the touch pressure.

detaileddescription.para: The pressure range starts at 0.0f. Normal pressure is defined as 1.0f. A value between 0.0f and 1.0f means light pressure has been applied. A value greater than 1.0f means more pressure than normal has been applied.

briefdescription.para: Sets the angle of the press point relative to the Y-Axis.

parameterdescription.para: The angle of the press point relative to the Y-Axis.

briefdescription.para: Sets the class of the device for the event.
Sets the subclass of the device for the event.
Retrieve the Unique Device ID of the point.

simplesect.para: The Unique Device ID of the point.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the state of the point.
Retrieve the screen position from the top-left of the screen.

simplesect.para: The screen position from the top-left of the screen.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the radius of the press point.

simplesect.para: The radius of the press point.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve BOTH the horizontal and the vertical radii of the press point.

simplesect.para: The radius of the press point.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the touch pressure.
Retrieve the angle of the press point relative to the Y-Axis.

simplesect.para: The angle of the press point.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the class of the device for the event.
Retrieve the subclass of the device for the event.
Get Mouse Button value. (ex: right/left button)
Set Mouse Button value. (ex: right/left button)
Gets the device name the event originated from.
Sets the device name the event originated from.
Sets the hit actor under this point.
Set the co-ordinates relative to the top-left of the hit-actor.

simplesect.para: The top-left of an actor is (0.0, 0.0, 0.5).

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the Hit Actor.
Retrieve the local position relative to the top-left of the hit-actor.

simplesect.para: The top-left of an actor is (0.0, 0.0, 0.5).

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the touch point equivalent of this point for old API.
A Point represents a point on the screen that is currently being touched or where touch has stopped.
